title: Tapered Roller Bearings
content: Timken tapered roller bearings are designed to handle combined radial and axial loads simultaneously. Available in bore sizes from 0 to 8 inches (standard range) and 8 to 24 inches (large bore). Key features: high load capacity, high precision, long service life, suitable for heavy machinery, gearboxes, wheel hubs, conveyors, and mining equipment. Available as single-row, double-row, and four-row configurations. Anupam Bearings stocks a comprehensive range of Timken tapered roller bearings for immediate dispatch.

title: Cylindrical Roller Bearings (CRB)
content: Cylindrical roller bearings (CRB) are designed for heavy radial loads and high-speed applications. Available as single-row, double-row, and 4-row cylindrical roller bearings. The 4-row CRB is ideal for rolling mill applications with extremely heavy radial loads. Features: high stiffness, low friction, separable inner and outer rings for easy installation, suitable for machine tool spindles, electric motors, gearboxes, and continuous casting machines. Anupam Bearings supplies Timken CRBs ranging from small industrial sizes to 10-32 inch large bore variants manufactured at the Bharuch facility.

title: Spherical Roller Bearings (SRB)
content: Spherical roller bearings (SRB) feature a self-aligning design that accommodates shaft misalignment and deflection. Ideal for applications where shaft deflection is unavoidable. Features: high radial load capacity, moderate axial load capacity, self-aligning up to 1.5-2 degrees, sealed and open variants available. Applications: industrial fans, paper machines, gearboxes, crushers, vibrating screens, and heavy conveyors. Available in sizes from 10 to 32 inches from Timken's Bharuch facility through Anupam Bearings.

title: Double Row Tapered Roller Bearings
content: Double row tapered roller bearings are designed for applications requiring support of both radial and axial loads in both directions simultaneously. Features: compact design combining two single-row bearings, high rigidity, minimal axial displacement, pre-set internal clearance. Applications: wheel bearings, machine tool spindles, rolling mill back-up rolls, heavy-duty gearboxes. Timken double row tapered bearings are available through Anupam Bearings.

title: Spherical Plain Bearings
content: Spherical plain bearings are maintenance-free bearings designed for oscillating and slow rotational movements. Features: self-lubricating PTFE or bronze liner, high load capacity, compact design, maintenance-free operation, suitable for static and dynamic loads. Applications: construction equipment, agricultural machinery, hydraulic cylinders, robotic arms, and structural joints. Available in steel-steel and steel-bronze variants through Anupam Bearings.

title: Graphite Bush Bearings
content: Graphite bush bearings (also called self-lubricating bushings) use embedded graphite plugs to provide continuous lubrication without external grease or oil. Features: operates in temperatures from -200°C to +650°C, no lubrication maintenance required, excellent for dirty and wet environments, suitable for slow speeds and oscillating loads. Applications: glass manufacturing, steel plants, food processing, oven conveyors, and high-temperature industrial equipment. Available through Anupam Bearings.

title: Ball Transfer Units
content: Ball transfer units (BTUs) are omnidirectional conveying elements that allow loads to move freely in any horizontal direction. Features: 360-degree movement capability, ball-on-ball rolling contact, low friction, available in pressed steel, cast iron, and stainless steel housings. Capacity ranges from 25 kg to 500 kg per unit. Applications: material handling systems, packaging lines, sorting tables, assembly lines, and airport baggage systems. Available through Anupam Bearings.

title: Combined Roller Bearings
content: Combined roller bearings integrate radial cylindrical roller bearings with axial needle or cylindrical roller bearings into a single compact unit. Features: handles combined radial and axial loads in minimal installation space, high rigidity, precision, suitable for high-speed operation. Applications: machine tools, printing machines, textile machinery, and automation equipment. Available through Anupam Bearings.
